Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Richard Dawley

RULING:
DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES

Hearing held and the Court took Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation's motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication under submission. Each side submitted a proposed order for the Court's consideration. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Miles Lendway of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #13684 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Continued To Apr-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Lisa L. Oberg and Felicia Feng of McKENNA LONG & ALDRIDGE (415-267-4175), appearing for defendant / moving party Metalclad Insulation Corporation
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Richard Dawley

RULING:
DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES

Hearing held on defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation's motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication. Off the record the Court ordered a further hearing on the applicability of "Webb v. Special Electric Co., Inc." (March 14, 2013) 2013 WL 991600, to defendant's motion. The supplemental briefs are limited to 5 pages and due by 4/5 at 4:00 p.m. The further hearing is set on April 10, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Sandy Lee of AIKEN WELCH, CSR 971 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
